name: Orchestra Chat Watch
description: Syncs ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini tab state to Orchestra for browser chat watching.

content_scripts.comment: TEST-ONLY auto-send driver (v3-browser-driver). Always loaded but INERT unless the `taskAppChatWatchDriver` storage flag is on — its only always-on surface is a CHAT_DRIVE message listener that refuses every command while the flag is off. Chosen over a separately-gated entry so the production extension ships one manifest; the runtime flag is the gate. Runs in the ISOLATED world so it can use chrome.runtime; Gemini Quill uses the native-input path inside driver.js.
